headline: PulteGroup, Inc. (PHM) is Attracting Investor Attention: Here is What You Should Know

headline: PulteGroup (NYSE:PHM) Passes Peter Lynch GARP Screen with Low PEG and Strong Financial Health
summary: PulteGroup (PHM) fits Peter Lynch’s GARP strategy with a PEG ratio of 0.72, 18% earnings growth, low debt, and strong profitability—offering value in a cooling housing market.

headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Overweight on PulteGroup, Raises Price Target to $150
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Sam Reid   maintains PulteGroup (NYSE:PHM) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $140 to $150.
